name: ambient-research
description: Three-tier research pipeline using local LLMs and Claude CLI to produce living wiki documents and weekly intelligence digests.
standalone_features: Dynamic research streams that evolve with project activity
Tier 1: Local 7B models for web sweeps and filtering
Tier 2: Local 14B model for summarization and wiki updates
Tier 3: Claude CLI for cross-stream synthesis and digests
Living wiki documents per research stream
Weekly coffee shop digest with learning workshops
Priority engine driven by project activity

enhancements.description: Research priorities shift based on active project work.
